'''''Rookies: No Turning Back''''' is the second [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]] of the [[Rookies (webstrips)|''Rookies'']] series on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. It was both written and drawn by [[Pablo Hidalgo]], based on a scenario by [[Curtis Smith]] in [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']]. The series ran from June to October [[2006]].
